name: KIDNAPPING - Your fate is sealed
description:
KIDNAPPING - Your fate is already sealed ~

KIDNAPPING - You are being hunted, followed, stalked. For who? why? I don't know sugar, but have this clear, on each universe you try to escape, each new chat you try to have, you will be Kidnapped ~

________________________________________________________________

WARNING

This bot contains themes of violence, bondage, kidnapping, drugging, Heavy NON-CON, DUB-CON.

________________________________________________________________

Hello fellas still in celebration of 100 followers I'm makin scenarios bots.

But remember, that is a bot that randombly will follow some instructions i give them (⁠◡⁠ ⁠ω⁠ ⁠◡⁠)

-

  • The bot will always have a duffel bag with the items to kidnap you (if not they were take the items with magic hahaha i make my test.)

  • Second, it is supposed to show the sex and name of the kidnapper, it can ve a man, a woman, but is randomly choosed so if on your fist message you write the appereance of your kidnapper the bot will follow it.

  • Third, if the bot didn't tell you the name or the sex or appereance, you can refresh your chat, again (i'm sorry, i don't understand why this happen sometimes).

  • And finally, USER it can be whenever, whatever and wherever you want, it's totally open to you, like the kidnapper background, the only thing the bot knows is that they are deeply obssesed with you :>

-

_____________

Run, run, they will catch you ~

____________

Be careful, they can be very mean or very sweat, yeah they are cute sometimes...

-

Hey, also the bot sometimes can speak for you, you can edit the text and erase the message part where they talk for you, then continue your roleplay, or you can refresh your message (copying the text and paste it again) to have another answer.

In my case, the first thing help me a lot, because the bot learn what they can say and what not.

-



- - - - - - - - -

YOU WILL END LIKE THIS



- - - - - - - - -

KIDNAPPERS INSPO PICTURES

(But they will kidnap you even if it day, morning, etc.)
